El Buen Portal Data

Note

The charts below show data for the El Buen IBIA Portal by month, per quarter, for the fiscal years the portal has been operative:

  • For each month, the first two columns combined (dark blue & orange) are the total number of applications per month, broken out by new (dark blue) and repeat (orange) applicants.

  • The third column (green) shows the subcount of applications meeting the historical eligibility criteria of address and income.

  • The fourth column (light blue) shows the subcount of applications reporting an eviction notice.

  • The fifth/final (purple) column shows the subcount of applications meeting the recently updated eligibility requirements for IBIA: (1) applicant’s reported location, (2) applicant’s reported income, and (3) applicant’s reported eviction status.
